title: Potatopack
description: This makes the Minecraft experience more potato focused
body:
### Potatopack is COOL!

Progress: 99% done!

**Currently only the language en_us is supported so please set the language to American English!**

GET EMF and ETF TO GET THIS TO WORK!!

This makes some if the items and blocks potato styled, as well as gui and others.

Includes:
- Armor and tools
- Ores and minerals
- Foods
- HUD and GUI elements
- Elytra
- All tools
- Utilities
- Some Entities
- misc

Compatible with:
- Appleskin
- More Heart Types
- Axiom (mildly)
- Visuality
- Modmenu
